meaning: 明打威群岛[印度尼西亚西部](或译民大威群岛)
examples: The 7.5 magnitude quake hit the Mentawai islands, late on Monday.
The epicentre was 70km from the Mentawai islands, and the quake was felt there only weakly.
Monday's quake generated a 10-foot tsunami that struck the Mentawai islands, just off the Sumatran coast.
However, warning messages could not be issued quickly enough to protect populations within minutes of the epicenter, near the Indonesian Mentawai Islands.
